name: Nehru Place Junction
cause: Metro Phase IV construction and high commuter volume during peak hours.

name: Dhaula Kuan Interchange
cause: Strategic bottleneck during airport transit peak hours and lane narrowing.

name: Ashram Chowk Stretch
cause: Heavy vehicle movement and ongoing flyover extension work.

name: Minto Road Underpass
cause: High risk of localized waterlogging predicted due to pre-monsoon showers.

name: IIT Flyover (Aurobindo Marg)
